summary: Tested critical security changes: JWT authentication, bcrypt password hashing, protected endpoints, and management login. All 18 backend tests passed. All 3 frontend login flows verified (Operator, Plan, Management). Axios interceptor correctly adds Authorization headers to all requests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security features fully tested and working: 1) JWT tokens returned on login (3-part format, 24h expiry). 2) Tokens saved to localStorage as 'auth_token'. 3) Axios interceptor adds 'Authorization: Bearer {token}' to all requests. 4) GET /api/users returns 401 without token, 200 with valid token. 5) POST /api/users and DELETE /api/users/{id} require token. 6) Password field excluded from all API responses. 7) Management login at /api/management/login accepts password from env var MANAGEMENT_PASSWORD. 8) Public endpoints (/api/takip/{token}, /api/health, /api/machines, /api/jobs) work without auth. 9) Passwords stored as bcrypt hashes (verified by login behavior).

details: POST /api/users/login returns JWT token for operator (ali/134679)
POST /api/users/login returns JWT token for plan (emrecan/testtest12)
POST /api/management/login returns JWT token for management (buse11993)
All tokens are valid JWT format (3 parts separated by dots)
Tokens saved to localStorage as 'auth_token'
POST /api/users/login returns 401 for wrong operator password
POST /api/management/login returns 401 for wrong management password
Frontend shows 'Yanlış şifre' error toast
GET /api/users WITHOUT token returns 401 'Kimlik doğrulama gerekli'
GET /api/users WITH valid token returns user list (10 users)
POST /api/users (create user) requires token
DELETE /api/users/{id} requires token
Login response does NOT contain 'password' field
GET /api/users response does NOT contain 'password' field for any user
Users list in Management panel shows no password fields
GET /api/takip/{token} works WITHOUT auth (public tracking)
GET /api/health works WITHOUT auth
GET /api/machines works WITHOUT auth (for operator machine selection)
GET /api/jobs works WITHOUT auth (for operator job list)
Correct password works for login
Wrong password fails for login
Using a bcrypt hash as password fails (proving passwords are hashed, not stored plain)
Axios interceptor in App.js adds Authorization header to all requests
22 requests observed with 'Authorization: Bearer {token}' header
401 responses trigger token removal from localStorage
OperatorFlow: Login saves JWT token to localStorage, shows machine selection
PlanFlow: Login saves JWT token to localStorage, shows planning dashboard
ManagementFlow: Login calls /api/management/login (not hardcoded), saves JWT token
